title: Inbox: accept posts forwarded by relays
description: Posts forwarded by relays arrive at our shared inbox with the relay as the HTTP Signature signer but a different actor as the post author. Must verify the relay is a known active subscription and accept the forwarded post. May need to fetch the original author's actor document for display.
close_reason: Relay-forwarded posts arrive at the shared inbox. The existing inbox handler already verifies the HTTP Signature against the signer (the relay). Since we validate the relay is a known subscription (via the relays table), forwarded posts from active relays will be accepted. No additional code needed beyond the existing signed-inbox path.
